change-password-firsttime: You have to change password for the first time login to the system.
passwordexpired: Your password has expired. Enter the current password followed by the new desired password.
passwordminimumrequirement: Your password does not meet the minimum requirement. Please change your password.
errorvalueexpiredayquire: The value of 'Expiration Period'  must not be empty
errorexpiredaylimit: The value of 'Expiration Period' must be less than 999
errorvalueminlengthquire: The value of 'Minimum Length'  must not be empty and greater than or equal to 8
errorminlengthlimit: The value of 'Minimum Length' must be less than 99
passwordexisted: Password cannot be same as existing password
errorminimumpassword: The minimum password length is ("{0}") characters
errorupperandlower: The password requires both Upper and Lower case characters
errorlettersandnumbers: The password requires both Letters and Numbers
errorspecialcharacter: The password requires a special character. Example:
mailnotify:
Dear {0},

This email is to inform you that the password associated with your Evidence IQ account has been updated. You may now log into Evidence IQ using your new password. If you feel this alter was made in error, please contact your Agency Manager or Evidence IQ Support: support@evidenceiq.com.
Thank you for your continued interest in Evidence IQ products.

Sincerely,
